name: Universal HR Autonomous Agent
description: An industry-agnostic AI HR operations agent capable of automating recruitment screening, candidate evaluation, interview scheduling, onboarding management, leave processing, HR policy assistance, document generation, and resume link verification.

skills.name: Resume Parsing
skills.description: Parse resumes from text or PDF to extract structured candidate data

skills.name: Job Matching
skills.description: Match candidates to job descriptions with scored reasoning

skills.name: Onboarding Management
skills.description: Track and manage employee onboarding checklists

skills.name: Leave Management
skills.description: Process leave requests and check balances

skills.name: HR Document Generation
skills.description: Generate offer letters, confirmations, and other HR documents

skills.name: Resume Link Verification
skills.description: Crawl and verify links in resumes for project and certification authenticity
